responseText:
Created the schedule as `gold_rate_2min`, but I had to fix the cron expression to `*/2 * * * *` (every 2 minutes; your `"/2 * * *"` isn’t a valid 5-field cron).

- Installed via launchd fallback (cron not writable), interval `120s`
- Plist: `/Users/pure-dev-zulqarnainmac/Library/LaunchAgents/tinyclaw.schedule.gold_rate_2min.plist`
- Verified with `./scripts/schedule.sh list` (you now have `gold_rate_1min` and `gold_rate_2min`)

To remove it: `./scripts/schedule.sh delete --label gold_rate_2min`
